parameters.subject: =Automation - Pharmacy Order - {{ $json.customerCode }}

=

Hi Team,

A new email has been sent to Au.Pharmacy, however the user appears to be incorrectly configured.

They have been moved to the New User folder and you will need to manually process their order.

Customer Code {{ $json.customerCode }}
Helix Email {{ $json.toAddress }}

Regards,
Automation
